B00EBZEAH4.prompt: A hand is holding the sugar scrub container, showing its open top with the product inside, against a soft-focus background of large green leaves. The container is positioned slightly above a second, closed container resting on the leaves. The scene is brightly lit with natural, diffused lighting, emphasizing clean, fresh aesthetics. The background features a plain white surface with the green foliage providing a natural, organic contrast. The hand is gently grasping the container, suggesting a soft, delicate interaction with the product. The overall composition is minimal and focused, highlighting the product in a natural, lifestyle setting.

B00N4LMZZK.prompt: A close-up shot of a hand with a generous amount of white, foamy sunscreen cream applied to the back of the hand, showing a textured, bubbly surface. The hand is positioned on the left side of the frame, resting on a plain, light-colored surface. To the right, slightly out of focus, lies the sunscreen cream tube, angled diagonally, with its pink polka-dotted packaging visible. The lighting is soft and even, highlighting the creamy texture of the product on the skin and the glossy finish of the tube. The background is a solid, neutral light tone, providing a clean and minimal setting.

B01DX1OEFO.prompt: A studio-style composition featuring six arms of varying skin tones, arranged in a staggered vertical layout against a soft, neutral gray gradient background. Each arm is positioned with the hand slightly open and facing forward, showcasing the inner forearm and wrist. On each forearm, five horizontal swatches of eyeshadow are applied in a vertical stack, evenly spaced and aligned, demonstrating the product’s color range and pigmentation across different skin tones. The swatches are arranged from lightest at the top to darkest at the bottom, with each color appearing as a solid, matte bar. The lighting is bright, even, and diffused, highlighting the texture and finish of the swatches without harsh shadows. The overall composition emphasizes inclusivity and product performance, with clean

B08JCY48DD.prompt: A close-up of the shaver foil and cutter in sharp focus, positioned prominently in the foreground on the right side of the frame. Behind it, a softly blurred background shows a man in a white shirt shaving his face with a razor, his face partially covered in shaving cream. The setting appears to be a bright, clean bathroom with natural light coming from a window on the right. The overall lighting is soft and even, highlighting the metallic texture of the product. The background is neutral and out of focus, creating depth and drawing attention to the product. The composition uses a shallow depth of field to emphasize the shaver foil and cutter while suggesting a real-life grooming context.

B0BQWQ55CD.prompt: A wooden-handled hair comb with a black combing section is positioned diagonally, resting on a rounded, beige ceramic object placed on a light wooden surface. The background features a softly blurred indoor setting with a light-colored tiled floor and a white wall with subtle vertical paneling. In the upper left corner, a small, out-of-focus pink floral element is visible, adding a delicate decorative touch. The lighting is soft and diffused, creating gentle highlights on the comb’s handle and a subtle shadow beneath the ceramic base. The overall composition is clean and natural, with a shallow depth of field that emphasizes the comb as the central subject.

A close-up shot of a person combing their dark hair with the hair comb, held in a natural hand position. The comb is positioned mid-stroke through the hair, with the handle gripped between the thumb and fingers. The background is a soft, out-of-focus white or light gray fabric, creating a clean and minimal setting. The lighting is soft and even, highlighting the texture of the hair and the smooth motion of the comb. The composition focuses on the interaction between the hand, the comb, and the hair, emphasizing gentle use and care.

B09HJHXVZW.prompt: A shirtless man with short dark hair is shown from the chest up, smiling with his eyes closed as he applies the antiperspirant deodorant to his raised armpit. He holds the product in his right hand, with the applicator tip touching his skin. The background is a dark, textured brick wall. The lighting is soft and focused, highlighting the man’s skin and the product in his hand. The image has a warm, natural tone with subtle shadows. All text and copy elements are ignored and not described.

B071NN2Z8F.prompt: A close-up shot of a pair of lips coated in a rich, vibrant fuchsia shade, showcasing the texture and finish of the liquid lipstick. The lips are full and well-defined, with natural lip lines visible, slightly parted to reveal a hint of teeth. The surrounding skin is smooth and evenly toned, with soft, diffused lighting that highlights the glossy, saturated color of the lips. The background is a plain, neutral off-white, with subtle white shapes at the lower corners suggesting a clean, minimalist setting. The focus is entirely on the lips, emphasizing the product’s color payoff and wear.

B07CTFVB4F.prompt: A close-up shot of a person sitting on a light wooden surface, wearing a soft white robe, gently applying a dollop of white cream to their lower leg with their fingers. The scene is softly lit with natural light, creating a calm and serene atmosphere. The background is softly blurred, showing light-colored drapes and a bright, airy indoor environment. The focus is on the smooth skin of the leg and the delicate application of the cream, emphasizing a moment of self-care and relaxation. The wooden floor has a natural, light finish with visible grain, adding warmth to the composition.

A close-up shot of a pair of hands holding an open jar of the body cream, with one finger gently scooping into the creamy white product inside. The jar is shown from a slightly elevated angle, revealing the smooth, swirled texture of the cream. The hands have neatly manicured nails with a French tip design. The background is plain white, creating a clean and minimalist aesthetic. The lighting is soft and even, highlighting the texture of the cream and the natural skin tone of the hands. The focus is on the interaction between the hands and the product, emphasizing the tactile experience of using the cream.

A woman in a white top is sitting on a white surface, applying a creamy substance to her thigh with her right hand. Her left hand gently rests on her knee. The cream is shown as a small, smooth, white swirl on her skin, being spread with light, natural motion. The background is softly blurred and uniformly white, creating a clean, minimal, and bright aesthetic. The lighting is soft and even, highlighting the smooth texture of the skin and the gentle application. The composition focuses closely on the lower torso and legs, emphasizing the action of applying the product.

B098VDJWFT.prompt: A close-up portrait of a person with long, voluminous curly hair styled in a top knot, wearing a neutral-toned turtleneck and a thin silver chain necklace, set against a soft, plain light green background. The lower third of the image features a solid bright lime green horizontal panel. The person is centered, looking directly at the camera with a calm, confident expression. The lighting is soft and even, highlighting the texture and shine of the hair. All text and copy elements are ignored.

B07VHS5K56.prompt: A close-up shot of a person’s eye with a warm, shimmery eyeshadow applied to the eyelid, blending seamlessly from the inner corner to the outer edge. The eyelid is smooth and luminous, with soft, diffused lighting highlighting the texture and subtle sparkle of the makeup. A fluffy makeup brush with light-colored bristles is gently touching the outer corner of the eyelid, mid-application. The eyebrow is well-defined and dark, arching naturally above the eye. The skin around the eye is clear and radiant, with a soft focus on the surrounding area to emphasize the eye and the application process. The background is softly blurred and neutral, keeping the focus entirely on the eye and the brush.

B081FGVS3Q.prompt: A close-up portrait of a woman wearing the headband, positioned across her forehead with her hair falling naturally around her face. She is shown in a three-quarter view, looking slightly to the side, with soft, even lighting highlighting her features. The background is a plain, light gray, creating a clean and minimalistic setting. The focus is on the headband as it sits on her head, with her hair partially covering the lower part of the band. She is wearing a dark green ribbed top, visible at the neckline. The overall composition is natural and softly lit, emphasizing the product in a realistic, wearable context.
